info.name: Tapfi Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for Tapfi Backend - Multi-tenant WiFi analytics platform

request.description: Login and get JWT tokens. Sets access_token and refresh_token in environment.
Login with temporary JWT token from URL parameter.
Refresh access token using refresh token.
Get all sessions for a user.
List all organizations for the authenticated user.
Set active organization for the user session.
List all organizations for the authenticated user.
List all clients with pagination and filters.
Get client information by device MAC address.

item.name: Get Captive Portal Registration Step by Client MAC

request.description: Determine captive portal registration step (register / validate / welcome) for a client device MAC.

item.name: Get Active Captive Portal by AP MAC

request.description: Resolve the active captive portal template for a given access point MAC (scheduler → branch config → default template).
Get visit analytics data from MongoDB. Date format: YYYYMMDD (e.g., 20250127)
